user_query:
I need a quick but comprehensive health audit of our self-hosted services using the provided configuration. Read input/watchdog.json and run checks in four modes using that config: (1) a standard summary, (2) machine-readable JSON, (3) alerts-only, and (4) SSL-only for HTTPS endpoints. Save the outputs to these exact files:
- output/summary.txt — the one-line-per-service summary
- output/report.json — the JSON output
- output/alerts.txt — alerts-only view (only issues, or a healthy message if none)
- output/ssl.txt — SSL-only results for HTTPS services
Then, write a short analysis that explains your findings and next steps in output/analysis.md. Please use only relative paths, read the config from input/watchdog.json via a config flag, and write nothing outside output/. In your analysis, call out any failing or warning services by name and include clear recommendations for remediation.
